name: KustRobot
description: Open-source Telegram Group Management Bot — modular, webhook-based, MongoDB-powered.

WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: A random secret string used to secure your webhook endpoint

MONGO_URI.description: MongoDB connection URI — use MongoDB Atlas for a free cloud database: https://mongodb.com/atlas

ADMIN_IDS.description: Your Telegram user ID(s), comma-separated. Get yours by messaging @userinfobot

scripts.postdeploy: echo KustRobot deployed! Set your webhook to https://YOUR_APP.herokuapp.com/webhook/$WEBHOOK_SECRET
